headline: Mars Exploration
description: Mars is the most explored planet beyond Earth. First flyby (Mariner 4, 1965). Key missions: Viking (first landing, 1976), Pathfinder/Sojourner (first rover, 1997), Spirit/Opportunity (2004, Oppy lasted 14 years — 45km), Curiosity (2012, still active, nuclear-powered), Perseverance (2021, collecting samples for return). Evidence of past liquid water is overwhelming.
